headline: Avery Dennison (AVY) On The Smart Labels Narrative And Its Undervalued View
summary: Avery Dennison (AVY) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed returns over the past year as investors weigh its materials and digital identification businesses. See our latest analysis for Avery Dennison. At a share price of $160.71, Avery Dennison has seen a 1 day share price gain of 1.03%. However, its year to date share price return is down 11.91% and the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 9.8%, which may indicate fading momentum as...
